decontamination_notes: Real feature from pytest-dev/pytest PR #14647, merged 2026-06-25, after model training cutoffs. Exposes pytest.Approx as the public base type of every approx() return, requiring a new/renamed public class, wiring in pytest/__init__ (__all__), and rewiring the assertion compare machinery (_compare_any) plus every Approx subclass. Repo sliced at base commit (src/ + pyproject + LICENSE); MIT LICENSE preserved. A stub src/_pytest/_version.py is added to the slice because pytest generates it via setuptools-scm at build time (not committed). Runs in per-task image vulcanbench/sandbox:pytest-14647; tests import pytest from the workspace via PYTHONPATH=src.
